nuggets.headline: Billie Eilish shortened her stage name from a mellifluous mouthful
nuggets.text: What you hear now is just a snippet of her full name: Billie Eilish Pirate Baird O'Connell! When she stormed onto the music scene in the mid-2010s, the Angeleno singer-songwriter wisely shortened it for the world stage. Her parents, both actors, even did video-game voices while Billie grew up in Los Angeles.

source.title: How Did Billie Eilish Get Famous? 9 Facts You Didn't ... - Grammy
source.quoteSnippet: Eilish's full name is actually Billie Eilish Pirate Baird O'Connell... when the Angeleno singer/songwriter stormed onto the music scene in the mid-2010s, she shortened it

nuggets.imageCaption: Billie Eilish in a promotional shot for her debut album.

nuggets.headline: Billie Eilish's producer brother, FINNEAS, has a unique minimalist philosophy
nuggets.text: When you're listening to "bad guy" and the whole *WHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?* album, you're hearing FINNEAS's distinct production philosophy at play. He calls it "like a room with furniture," preferring empty space to keep Billie's astonishingly raw vocal front and center. He's very proud that he was the *only* producer for her entire debut album, which is rare in pop music today!

source.title: Meet The First-Time GRAMMY Nominee: FINNEAS On Billie Eilish ...
source.quoteSnippet: FINNEAS... produced all of Eilish's haunting bedroom-pop debut WHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?... hyper-minimalist production style... not afraid of a little empty space. His main goal, ultimately, is to place the artist's vocal front and center... Billie had only one [producer]. And I'm very proud of that.

nuggets.imageCaption: FINNEAS, Billie Eilish's brother and sole producer for her debut album.

nuggets.headline: If "bad guy" is hitting, check out FINNEAS's solo work next
nuggets.text: If you're loving the distinctive sound of Billie Eilish, you absolutely need to dive into her brother FINNEAS's solo music. He's not just her inseparable creative facilitator and producer for all her music; he's a 10-time GRAMMY winner in his own right and has a burgeoning solo career, having released his own EP, *Blood Harmony*.

source.title: How Did Billie Eilish Get Famous? 9 Facts You Didn't ... - Grammy
source.quoteSnippet: FINNEAS... has worked with her throughout her career and become her inseparable creative facilitator. Basically, whenever you hear an Eilish song, you're hearing her 10-time GRAMMY-winning brother, too.

nuggets.imageCaption: FINNEAS, who writes and produces all of Billie Eilish's music.

artistSummary: Billie Eilish, whose full name is Billie Eilish Pirate Baird O'Connell, is a GRAMMY-winning pop superstar known for her raw songcraft and inimitable voice. She has an inseparable creative bond with her brother and producer, FINNEAS.
